dharma_rakshak.title: Temple Trust Fund Diversion
dharma_rakshak.description: An RTI reveals that ₹2.3 crore donated to Shastri ji's 'Dharma Raksha Trust' was used to buy a luxury SUV.  Temple donor lists show ghost entries.
dharma_rakshak.evidence: RTI document #MP/2023/4451, bank statements showing cash withdrawals, luxury vehicle registration in a relative's name.
dharma_rakshak.counter_narrative: These are fabricated documents by anti-Hindu forces trying to defame our dharmic mission.

dharma_rakshak.title: Caste Discrimination in Cow Shelter
dharma_rakshak.description: Dalit workers at Shastri ji's model gaushala report being forced to use separate utensils and denied entry to the prayer area. Video evidence surfaces on social media.
dharma_rakshak.evidence: Viral video clip (47 seconds), testimony from 3 former workers, local journalist investigation.
dharma_rakshak.counter_narrative: This is taken out of context. We follow traditional protocols that have existed for centuries.

dharma_rakshak.title: Anti-Science Curriculum Controversy
dharma_rakshak.description: Shastri ji's proposed 'Vedic Vidya' curriculum suggests replacing Darwin's evolution theory with Dashavatar theory and claims ancient India had nuclear weapons.
dharma_rakshak.evidence: Leaked curriculum document, expert committee dissent notes, UNESCO criticism cited in Indian Express.
dharma_rakshak.counter_narrative: Western science has its limitations. Our rishis discovered these truths thousands of years ago.

vikas_purush.title: FinTech Data Privacy Scandal
vikas_purush.description: Arjun's former fintech company 'PayGram' sold financial data of 3 lakh rural users to a Chinese ad-tech company. An ex-employee becomes whistleblower.
vikas_purush.evidence: Whistleblower affidavit, server logs showing data transfers to Beijing-based servers, RBI notice to PayGram.
vikas_purush.counter_narrative: This was a vendor-side issue that we fixed within 48 hours. We published a full transparency report.

vikas_purush.title: Ghost Village Visits
vikas_purush.description: Investigation reveals that 12 of Arjun's '200 village visits' were staged photo-ops lasting under 30 minutes, with pre-arranged 'villagers' who were actually party workers.
vikas_purush.evidence: Geotagged photo timestamps, interviews with actual village residents who never saw him, party worker WhatsApp group screenshots.
vikas_purush.counter_narrative: Some visits were shorter due to schedule constraints. The work we did in other villages speaks for itself.

vikas_purush.title: English-Only Town Halls
vikas_purush.description: Three consecutive town halls were conducted entirely in English with no Hindi translation. Viral clips show confused elderly farmers while Arjun explains 'blockchain governance'.
vikas_purush.evidence: Full town hall recordings, social media clips with 1M+ views, editorial in Dainik Bhaskar.
vikas_purush.counter_narrative: I've started bilingual sessions and hired a full-time Hindi communications team.

jan_neta.title: Protest Violence and Property Damage
jan_neta.description: During the 'Roti Andolan', Meera Devi's supporters destroyed 15 government vehicles and set fire to a Block Development Office. Three police constables were injured.
jan_neta.evidence: FIR #345/2022, CCTV footage, hospital records of injured constables, property damage assessment report.
jan_neta.counter_narrative: When the system is deaf, the people have a right to be heard. We condemn violence but understand frustration.

jan_neta.title: Unfunded Mandate — Where's the Money?
jan_neta.description: An economic analysis shows Meera Devi's promises (MNREGA 200 days + land redistribution + free healthcare) would cost ₹4,700 crore — 8x the district's entire budget. No funding plan exists.
jan_neta.evidence: Independent analysis by NIPFP economists, published in Economic & Political Weekly, Meera Devi's manifesto vs. budget data comparison.
jan_neta.counter_narrative: Tax the rich, cut military spending, eliminate corruption — the money is there, they just don't want to share it.

jan_neta.title: Anti-Business Rhetoric Kills Jobs
jan_neta.description: After Meera Devi's rally threatening to 'shut down every factory that doesn't share profits', three planned investments (textile, food processing, solar) were withdrawn from the district.
jan_neta.evidence: Company withdrawal letters, District Industrial Centre records, Collector's statement to press.
jan_neta.counter_narrative: Companies that run away from workers' rights are exactly the kind we don't want. Good riddance.

mukti_devi.title: MNC Think Tank Funding — Conflict of Interest
mukti_devi.description: Nandini's 'Pragati Foundation' received ₹5 crore from Monsanto, Reliance Retail, and Adani Ports — the same companies that would benefit from her deregulation policies.
mukti_devi.evidence: FCRA filing records, foundation annual report donor list, policy recommendation timeline matching donor interests.
mukti_devi.counter_narrative: Research funding is standard practice globally. Our recommendations are evidence-based, not donor-driven.

mukti_devi.title: MSP Abolition Paper
mukti_devi.description: A 2019 research paper authored by Nandini proposes 'phasing out MSP within 3 years and replacing it with market discovery prices.' Farmer unions circulate it widely.
mukti_devi.evidence: Published paper in Indian Journal of Agricultural Economics, Nandini's own authorship, specific quotes recommending MSP abolition.
mukti_devi.counter_narrative: That paper was an academic exercise exploring all options. My actual policy is to reform MSP, not abolish it.

mukti_devi.title: NRI Disconnect — 15 Years Abroad
mukti_devi.description: Opposition highlights that Nandini lived in Washington D.C. for 15 years, has an American green card (surrendered only last year), and her children study in a US university.
mukti_devi.evidence: Passport records, green card surrender certificate dated 11 months ago, university enrollment records.
mukti_devi.counter_narrative: I went abroad to learn and came back to serve. Brain drain criticism is exactly why talent leaves India in the first place.

meta.affected_demographics_range: Negative values represent happiness point loss for each voter group when scandal is exposed
meta.description: Weaknesses are deployed as 'scandal cards' during gameplay. Each has a counter-narrative the AI can use to defend itself.
